arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney alternative hands Celtic major transfer boost as Luis Palma breaks silence on loan exit
arts.sum: Manchester United full back Tyrell Malacia - who has been touted as a potential Hoops target - has reportedly seen a potential move to Benfica fall through

arts.ttl: Man United star says his farewells to team-mates as he looks set for Benfica move - with Marcus Rashford also nearing shock move to Aston Villa
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: A Manchester United defender has said his farewells to teammates at Carrington as he looks to join Benfica.

arts.ttl: Patrick Dorgu's imminent arrival 'will lead' to Man United defender 'departing' before end of January transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Tyrell Malacia allegedly agrees to make the move to Benfica on loan for the second half of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Official | Freiburg sign Benfica’s Jan-Niklas Beste
arts.sum: SC Freiburg officially unveiled Jan-Niklas Beste as a new signing on Friday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Preview: Estrela Amadora vs. Benfica - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Primeira Liga clash between Estrela Amadora and Benfica, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
